_comment: Diagnostic round: Qwen3.6-35B-A3B thinking-on with max_tokens=8192 to test whether D-category JSON automation completes when reasoning trace + JSON body have sufficient output budget. Mirrors models_config_qwen35b_thinking_on_64gb.json but overrides max_tokens.
_recommended_sequence: score the exact timestamped raw D-smoke result with prompts/test_suite_v0.3_d_only.json
if D smoke has hard_fail 0 and D average >=4, rerun with prompts/test_suite_v0.3.json and score the exact full raw result
_baseline_policy: Diagnostic round. NOT directly comparable to default-2048-cap baselines (gpt-oss dynamic / Qwen 32GB preview). Label discipline 필수.
_policy: Use default KV for this round. q8 KV remains a separate runtime matrix.
thinking-on is controlled per request with OpenAI-compatible reasoning_effort='medium'. Do not create a second Ollama Modelfile for thinking mode.

max_tokens=8192 override: previous default 2048-cap D smoke failed by output budget exhaustion (D_01/D_03 EMPTY_RESPONSE with completion_tokens=2048). This diagnostic checks if higher budget unblocks JSON completion.
Run D smoke first because reasoning traces/fences are the main automation-safety risk.

models.label: qwen3.6-35b-a3b-64gb-thinking-on-maxtok8k
models._role: thinking-on D 자동화 안전성 진단 — max_tokens=8192로 reasoning trace + JSON 예산 확보 후 D smoke 재시도
